## How was it tested?

## Checklist

- [ ] I opened/linked an issue for anything beyond a small fix
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] No new hosted-service / telemetry integrations (pushcv stays local-first)
- [ ] No personal data or generated files (`pushcv.db`, `profile.md`, `drafts/`)
      are committed
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior or commands changed
